title: BrokerFeed interface + tick types
acceptance_criteria: src/ingestion/brokers/types.ts exports interface BrokerTick { time: number; symbol: string; underlying: string; ltp: number; bid: number; ask: number; volume: number; oi: number; optionType?: 'CE' | 'PE'; strike?: number; expiry?: string; isIndex: boolean; }

Exports interface BrokerFeed { connect(): Promise<void>; subscribe(symbols: string[]): Promise<void>; disconnect(): Promise<void>; on(event: 'tick', handler: (tick: BrokerTick) => void): this; on(event: 'error', handler: (err: Error) => void): this; on(event: 'disconnect', handler: (reason: string) => void): this; on(event: 'reconnecting', handler: (attempt: number) => void): this; }
Exports enum DisconnectReason { AUTH_FAILURE = 'AUTH_FAILURE', TRANSIENT = 'TRANSIENT', MANUAL = 'MANUAL' }
All exports are named exports; file contains no implementation logic — only type/interface definitions
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
